reviews.comment:
Las estaciones ACA deberían tener a lo largo del país un criterio unificado en una cosa tan simple como de qué lado posicionar el auto para cargar combustible. Si bien el sentido común indica que deberías colocarte del lado donde la manguera no tenga que cruzar el vehículo, en algunos lados te indican que es al revés y no te cargan (ya sea al derecho o al revés) si no está colocado según "su gusto".

(Translated by Google)
ACA gas stations across the country should have a unified policy on something as simple as which side to position your car on to refuel. While common sense dictates that you should position yourself on the side where the pump doesn't have to cross the vehicle, some stations tell you it's the other way around and won't fill your car (whether it's the right way or the other way around) if it's not positioned according to "their preference."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16090706033176576823/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjOGZLRGpnRRAB
